---
title: "Blog et al."
description-meta: "Blog - Christian Rauh"
listing: 
  id: blog
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  page-size: 100
  categories: true
  sort-ui: true
  filter-ui: true
  feed: true
  contents: 
    - blog
    - blog/blog-links.yml

draft-mode: unlinked
page-navigation: false
title-block-banner: false
---
This page assembles some of my outputs and musings that do not easily fit into standard categories ... 
<br>
<br>

:::{#blog}
:::
